result.stderr:
PluginMerge 1.0.15+74a5b35bacf0f20c7d8af108f7b83a7b9e7951e4
Copyright (c) MJSU 2022
USAGE:
Merge and Compile:
  plugin.merge merge -c -m -p ./merge.json
Merge Only:
  plugin.merge merge -m -p
  C:\Users\USERNAME\Source\Repos\MyFirstMergePlugin\merge.json
Merge Additional Output Paths:
  plugin.merge merge -c -m -o ./additional/output/path -p ./merge.json
Compile Only:
  plugin.merge merge -c -p ./merge.json

  -p, --path       (Default: ./merge.yml) Path to the merge.json configuration
                   file

  -m, --merge      (Group: Mode) (Default: false) Enables merge mode to merge
                   files into a single plugin/framework file

  -c, --compile    (Group: Mode) (Default: false) Enables compile mode. Will
                   attempt to compile merged file and display any errors if it
                   fails.

  -o, --output     Additional output paths for the generated code file

  -l, --log        Log Level for output

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.
